nodes.name: Filter Empty Rows
nodes.notes: Skips blank rows. Only rows with a name + email pass through.

nodes.name: Calculate Date Variables
nodes.notes: FIX: t5_window_date is now 10 days (was 9) to catch boundary customers.

value.original_subject: ={{ 'Update on Your ' + $('Loop T+3 (1 at a time)').item.json['Project Type'] + ' Project - We\'re Making Progress!' }}

nodes.name: Is T+5 Email Due?
nodes.notes: FIX: Requires T3_Email_Sent=YES so T+5 never sends before or at the same time as T+3.

nodes.name: Is Feedback Email Due?
nodes.notes: FIX: Added All Done check so completed+upselled customers don't get feedback emails again.

nodes.name: Mark Upsell Email Sent
nodes.notes: Sets Status = All Done after upsell - stops all future checks for this customer.

parameters.subject: ={{ ' Update on Your ' + $json['Project Type'] + ' Project - We\'re Making Progress!' }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }},

We hope you're doing well! Here's a quick update on your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project.

Day 3 Update: Our team is deep in the research and drafting phase - making sure every detail reflects your unique skills and experience.

  • Reviewing your background and goals
  • Crafting compelling, ATS-optimized content
  • Aligning your profile with industry standards

If you have any additional info to share (achievements, certifications etc.), feel free to reply to this email!

Estimated completion is just around the corner. Stay tuned!


Warm regards,

The [Your Company] Team

You're receiving this because you have an active project with us.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json['original_subject'] }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }},

Great news - your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project is well underway and results are taking shape!

Day 5 Update: We're now in the final refinement stage - polishing the language, optimizing for recruiter attention, and tailoring everything to your goals.

  • Draft content completed
  • ATS keyword optimization done
  • Final quality review in progress

You'll receive the final deliverable very shortly. We can't wait for you to see it!

If there's anything specific you'd like adjusted, just reply to this email.


Best,

The [Your Company] Team

You're receiving this because you have an active project with us.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json['original_subject'] }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }}, your project is complete!

We're thrilled to let you know that your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project has been finalized and delivered. It was a pleasure working with you!

We'd love to hear your thoughts - it only takes 1 minute and helps us serve our clients better.

Leave Your Feedback

Thank you for trusting us with your career journey!


With gratitude,

The [Your Company] Team

Reply to this email if you have any questions about your deliverable.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json['original_subject'] }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }},

It's been a few days since we wrapped up your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project - we hope it's already opening doors for you!

We wanted to share some premium services that could take your career even further:

LinkedIn Optimization3x more recruiter views
Cover Letter BundleCustom letters for your top 5 roles
Interview Prep Session1-on-1 mock interview coaching
Job Application StrategyCustomized job hunt roadmap

As a returning client, use code RETURN15 for an exclusive 15% discount. Offer valid for 7 days.

Explore Premium Services

Cheering you on,
